title: ICI Hammerite 5092825 Direct to Rust Metal Paint - Smooth Dark Green Finish 750ML
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: Can be applied directly onto rust
description: From the manufacturer Hammerite Direct to Rust Exterior Gloss Paint, Blue Flawless, long-lasting, smooth gloss finish Keeping its sheen through all seasons, Hammerite Direct to Rust Metal Paint is a durable, decorative coating for ferrous and non-ferrous metals that provides up to 8 years of protection against rust, corrosion and UV damage. Save time on preparation Paint straight onto rusty metal surfaces with a unique 3-in-1 formula that needs no primer, undercoat or topcoat. It's so easy to restore, decorate and protect your metals and get a perfect finish every time. HOW TO USE Remove all loose rust and flaking paint with a wire brush Wash and rinse with clean water and allow to dry Stir the paint and apply with a brush or roller For best results apply two thin coats of Hammerite Leave to dry for 4 hours in between coats DIRECT TO RUST Made with an innovative formula, Hammerite Direct to Rust instantly provides the ultimate protection for your metals with no need for lengthy pre-treatment. ALKYD TECHNOLOGY Unique alykd technology forms a touch barrier for long-lasting metal protection from water, frost, sunlight and rust. 3-IN-1 PAINT Undercoat, primer and topcoat in one. Apply directly to rusty metals to quickly and effectively transform your home and garden with the perfect finish – first time, every time.
